title: epipactis helleborine subsp. distans
intro: Epipactis helleborine subsp. distans is a subspecies of the Helleborine orchid, a type of terrestrial orchid native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and acting as a natural remedy for digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Epipactis helleborine subsp. distans is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
